title: AWR — SQL · Wait · Segment Correlation & Advisory

list.description: Base URL for Portal URL — change to server IP for intranet access
list.label: Portal URL
list.name: portal_url

list.description: Base URL for Grafana URL — change to server IP for intranet access
list.label: Grafana URL
list.name: grafana_url
dbname
list.label: Database
list.query: SELECT value, label FROM (  SELECT '' AS value, '' AS label  UNION ALL  SELECT DISTINCT dbname AS value, dbname AS label FROM awr_load_profile) AS t ORDER BY value;

list.name: instance
list.label: Instance
list.query: SELECT value, label FROM (  SELECT '' AS value, '' AS label  UNION ALL  SELECT DISTINCT instance AS value, instance AS label  FROM awr_load_profile WHERE dbname='${dbname}') AS t ORDER BY value;

list.name: start_snap
list.label: Start Snap
list.query: SELECT '' AS label UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT begin_snap::int || ' - ' || to_char(snap_time,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') FROM awr_load_profile WHERE dbname='${dbname}' AND instance='${instance}' ORDER BY label NULLS FIRST;

list.name: end_snap
list.label: End Snap
list.query: SELECT '' AS label UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT begin_snap::int || ' - ' || to_char(snap_time,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') FROM awr_load_profile WHERE dbname='${dbname}' AND instance='${instance}' ORDER BY label NULLS FIRST;

options.content: ⬅ Portal Home  |  ⚠️ Problem Areas  |  🚨 AWR Anomaly Detection  |  🔗 AWR+SAR Correlation  |  📌 Navigation Hub

targets.rawSql: WITH f AS (  SELECT begin_snap, event::text AS event, SUM(pct_time) AS event_pct_snap  FROM awr_wait_summary_mv  WHERE dbname='$dbname'    AND instance='$instance'    AND begin_snap BETWEEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int AND split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int    AND ( '$wait_scope' IN ('', 'All') OR wait_scope = '$wait_scope' )  GROUP BY begin_snap, event ), t AS (  SELECT begin_snap, SUM(pct_time) AS total_pct_snap  FROM awr_wait_summary_mv  WHERE dbname='$dbname'    AND instance='$instance'    AND begin_snap BETWEEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int AND split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int    AND ( '$wait_scope' IN ('', 'All') OR wait_scope = '$wait_scope' )  GROUP BY begin_snap ) SELECT f.event AS name, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(f.event_pct_snap) / NULLIF(SUM(t.total_pct_snap),0), 2) AS value FROM f JOIN t USING (begin_snap) GROUP BY f.event ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 10;

WITH base AS (
SELECT s.begin_snap,s.event::text AS event, COALESCE(m.wait_class, 'Other') AS wait_class, SUM(s.pct_time) AS event_pct_snap
FROM awr_wait_summary_mv s
 LEFT JOIN awr_wait_event_master m
ON TRIM(LOWER(s.event)) = TRIM(LOWER(m.event))
WHERE s.dbname = '$dbname' AND s.instance = '$instance'
AND s.begin_snap BETWEEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int
AND split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int
AND ( '$wait_scope' IN ('', 'All') OR s.wait_scope = '$wait_scope' )
GROUP BY s.begin_snap, s.event, m.wait_class),
tot AS (
SELECT s.begin_snap, SUM(s.pct_time) AS total_pct_snap
FROM awr_wait_summary_mv s
WHERE s.dbname = '$dbname'
AND s.instance = '$instance'
AND s.begin_snap BETWEEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int
AND split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int
AND ( '$wait_scope' IN ('', 'All') OR s.wait_scope = '$wait_scope' )
GROUP BY s.begin_snap)
SELECT b.wait_class, b.event,
ROUND( 100.0 * SUM(b.event_pct_snap) / NULLIF(SUM(t.total_pct_snap), 0), 2 ) AS severity_score,
CASE
WHEN ROUND( 100.0 * SUM(b.event_pct_snap) / NULLIF(SUM(t.total_pct_snap), 0), 2 ) >= 80 THEN '🔴'
WHEN ROUND( 100.0 * SUM(b.event_pct_snap) / NULLIF(SUM(t.total_pct_snap), 0), 2 ) BETWEEN 41 AND 79 THEN '🟠'
WHEN ROUND( 100.0 * SUM(b.event_pct_snap) / NULLIF(SUM(t.total_pct_snap), 0), 2 ) BETWEEN 11 AND 40 THEN '🟡'
ELSE '🟢'
END AS severity_rag
FROM base b
JOIN tot t USING (begin_snap)
GROUP BY b.wait_class, b.event
ORDER BY severity_score DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT sql_id::text AS name, ROUND(AVG(severity_score)::numeric,2) AS value FROM awr_sql_summary_mv WHERE '$dbname'!='' AND '$instance'!='' AND '$start_snap'!='' AND '$end_snap'!=''   AND dbname='$dbname' AND instance='$instance'   AND begin_snap BETWEEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int AND split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int GROUP BY sql_id ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 10;

WITH base AS (  SELECT sql_id, AVG(severity_score) AS score   FROM awr_sql_summary_mv   WHERE dbname='$dbname' AND instance='$instance'     AND begin_snap BETWEEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int AND split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int   GROUP BY sql_id ), bl AS (   SELECT     percentile_cont(0.10) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY s) AS p10,     percentile_cont(0.40) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY s) AS p40,     percentile_cont(0.70) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY s) AS p70,     percentile_cont(0.90) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY s) AS p90   FROM (     SELECT AVG(severity_score) AS s     FROM awr_sql_summary_mv     WHERE dbname='$dbname' AND instance='$instance'       AND snap_time >= now() - concat('$baseline_days',' days')::interval     GROUP BY sql_id, begin_snap   ) t ), norm AS (   SELECT b.*, GREATEST(0, LEAST(100, 100 * (b.score - bl.p10) / NULLIF(bl.p90 - bl.p10, 0))) AS score_norm   FROM base b CROSS JOIN bl ) SELECT b.sql_id, CASE WHEN '$rag_mode'='percentile' THEN   CASE WHEN b.score >= bl.p90 THEN '🔴'        WHEN b.score >= bl.p70 THEN '🟠'        WHEN b.score >= bl.p40 THEN '🟡'        ELSE '🟢' END ELSE   CASE WHEN n.score_norm >= 80 THEN '🔴'        WHEN n.score_norm >= 41 THEN '🟠'        WHEN n.score_norm >= 11 THEN '🟡'        ELSE '🟢' END END AS severity_rag FROM base b CROSS JOIN bl LEFT JOIN norm n USING (sql_id) ORDER BY b.score DESC LIMIT 10;

SELECT object_name::text AS name, ROUND(AVG(severity_score)::numeric,2) AS value FROM awr_segment_summary_mv WHERE '$dbname'!='' AND '$instance'!='' AND '$start_snap'!='' AND '$end_snap'!=''   AND dbname='$dbname' AND instance='$instance'   AND begin_snap BETWEEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int AND split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int GROUP BY object_name ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 10;

WITH base AS (  SELECT owner, object_name, obj_type, COALESCE(subobject_name,'') AS subobject_name,         AVG(severity_score) AS score   FROM awr_segment_summary_mv   WHERE dbname='$dbname' AND instance='$instance'     AND begin_snap BETWEEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int AND split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int   GROUP BY owner, object_name, obj_type, subobject_name ), bl AS (   SELECT     percentile_cont(0.10) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY s) AS p10,     percentile_cont(0.40) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY s) AS p40,     percentile_cont(0.70) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY s) AS p70,     percentile_cont(0.90) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY s) AS p90   FROM (     SELECT AVG(severity_score) AS s     FROM awr_segment_summary_mv     WHERE dbname='$dbname' AND instance='$instance'       AND snap_time >= now() - concat('$baseline_days',' days')::interval     GROUP BY owner, object_name, obj_type, COALESCE(subobject_name,'')   ) t ), norm AS (   SELECT b.*, GREATEST(0, LEAST(100, 100 * (b.score - bl.p10) / NULLIF(bl.p90 - bl.p10, 0))) AS score_norm   FROM base b CROSS JOIN bl ) SELECT b.owner, b.object_name, b.obj_type, b.subobject_name, CASE WHEN '$rag_mode'='percentile' THEN   CASE WHEN b.score >= bl.p90 THEN '🔴'        WHEN b.score >= bl.p70 THEN '🟠'        WHEN b.score >= bl.p40 THEN '🟡'        ELSE '🟢' END ELSE   CASE WHEN n.score_norm >= 80 THEN '🔴'        WHEN n.score_norm >= 41 THEN '🟠'        WHEN n.score_norm >= 11 THEN '🟡'        ELSE '🟢' END END AS severity_rag FROM base b CROSS JOIN bl LEFT JOIN norm n USING (owner, object_name, obj_type, subobject_name) ORDER BY b.score DESC LIMIT 10;

panels.title: 🔗 Correlation & Recommendations (click Wait / SQL / Segment above to drill in)
Correlation & Recommendations — Select a Wait Event, SQL ID, or Segment above

targets.rawSql:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT
    lower(NULLIF('$open_drawer','')) AS open_flag,
    lower(NULLIF('$focus_type',''))  AS ftype,
    lower(NULLIF('$focus_value','')) AS fval,
    lower(NULLIF('$wait_scope',''))  AS scope_txt,
    '$start_snap'                    AS s_label,
    '$end_snap'                      AS e_label,
    split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int AS s_snap,
    split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int   AS e_snap,
    '$dbname'                        AS dbname,
    '$instance'                      AS instance
),

-- Window-scoped waits
win_waits AS (
  SELECT w.event, ROUND(AVG(w.pct_time),2) AS wait_pct
  FROM awr_wait_summary_mv w
  JOIN params p ON p.dbname=w.dbname AND p.instance=w.instance
  WHERE w.begin_snap BETWEEN (SELECT s_snap FROM params) AND (SELECT e_snap FROM params)
    AND ( (SELECT scope_txt FROM params) IN ('','all') OR lower(w.wait_scope) = (SELECT scope_txt FROM params) )
  GROUP BY w.event
),

/* =========================
   SQL focus (hybrid)
   ========================= */
focus_sql AS (
  SELECT fval AS sql_id FROM params
  WHERE (SELECT ftype FROM params)='sql' AND fval<>''
),

-- TEXT-MAP: segments referenced by focused SQL
sql_seg_text AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT s.owner, s.object_name, s.obj_type
  FROM awr_sql_object_map_mv m
  JOIN awr_segment_summary_mv s
    ON ( (m.owner <> '' AND lower(s.owner)=m.owner AND lower(s.object_name)=m.object)
      OR (m.owner = ''  AND lower(s.object_name)=m.object) )
  JOIN params p ON p.dbname=s.dbname AND p.instance=s.instance
  WHERE m.sql_id = (SELECT sql_id FROM focus_sql LIMIT 1)
    AND s.begin_snap BETWEEN (SELECT s_snap FROM params) AND (SELECT e_snap FROM params)
),

-- Co-occurrence helper views
sql_snap AS ( SELECT * FROM awr_sql_score_by_snap ),
seg_snap AS ( SELECT * FROM awr_seg_score_by_snap ),

-- Fallback: segments that co-occur with focused SQL across snaps
sql_seg_cooccur AS (
  SELECT se.owner, se.object_name, se.obj_type,
         SUM(se.seg_score_snap * sq.sql_score_snap) AS co_score
  FROM seg_snap se
  JOIN sql_snap sq
    ON sq.dbname=se.dbname AND sq.instance=se.instance AND sq.begin_snap=se.begin_snap
  JOIN params p ON p.dbname=se.dbname AND p.instance=se.instance
  WHERE sq.sql_id = (SELECT sql_id FROM focus_sql LIMIT 1)
    AND se.begin_snap BETWEEN (SELECT s_snap FROM params) AND (SELECT e_snap FROM params)
  GROUP BY se.owner, se.object_name, se.obj_type
),

-- union with priority: text first, then co-occur
sql_seg_union AS (
  SELECT owner, object_name, obj_type, 1000::numeric AS rank_signal
  FROM sql_seg_text
  UNION
  SELECT owner, object_name, obj_type, COALESCE(co_score,0) AS rank_signal
  FROM sql_seg_cooccur
),

-- PRE-AGG: avoid nested aggregates in ORDER BY
sql_seg_ranked AS (
  SELECT
    u.owner, u.object_name, u.obj_type,
    MAX(u.rank_signal)            AS rank_signal_max,
    AVG(s.severity_score)         AS seg_score_avg
  FROM sql_seg_union u
  JOIN awr_segment_summary_mv s
    ON lower(s.owner)=lower(u.owner)
   AND lower(s.object_name)=lower(u.object_name)
   AND s.obj_type=u.obj_type
  JOIN params p ON p.dbname=s.dbname AND p.instance=s.instance
  WHERE s.begin_snap BETWEEN (SELECT s_snap FROM params) AND (SELECT e_snap FROM params)
  GROUP BY u.owner, u.object_name, u.obj_type
),

-- Final: Segments referenced by SQL
block_sql_segments AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(
           string_agg(
             '• '|| owner||'.'||object_name||' ('||obj_type||') [score='||ROUND(seg_score_avg,2)::text||']',
             E'\n' ORDER BY rank_signal_max DESC, seg_score_avg DESC
           ),
           '—'
         ) AS txt
  FROM sql_seg_ranked
),

-- Top waits (window) for SQL focus
block_sql_waits AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(
           string_agg('• '|| event || ' ['|| ROUND(wait_pct,2)::text || '%]',
                      E'\n' ORDER BY wait_pct DESC),
           '—'
         ) AS txt
  FROM win_waits
  WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM focus_sql)
),

-- Other SQLs using these objects (text first, co-occur fallback)
block_sql_other_sqls AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(
           string_agg('• '|| x.sql_id, E'\n' ORDER BY x.rank_signal DESC, x.sql_score DESC NULLS LAST),
           '—'
         ) AS txt
  FROM (
    -- TEXT-BASED
    SELECT DISTINCT m.sql_id,
           1000::numeric AS rank_signal,
           (SELECT AVG(severity_score)
              FROM awr_sql_summary_mv q
              JOIN params p ON p.dbname=q.dbname AND p.instance=q.instance
             WHERE lower(q.sql_id)=m.sql_id
               AND q.begin_snap BETWEEN (SELECT s_snap FROM params) AND (SELECT e_snap FROM params)
           ) AS sql_score
    FROM sql_seg_ranked r
    JOIN awr_sql_object_map_mv m
      ON ( (m.owner <> '' AND m.owner=lower(r.owner) AND m.object=lower(r.object_name))
        OR (m.owner = ''  AND m.object=lower(r.object_name)) )
    WHERE m.sql_id <> (SELECT sql_id FROM focus_sql)

    UNION ALL

    -- CO-OCCURRENCE
    SELECT sq.sql_id,
           SUM(se.seg_score_snap * sq.sql_score_snap) AS rank_signal,
           AVG(sq.sql_score_snap) AS sql_score
    FROM sql_seg_ranked r
    JOIN seg_snap se
      ON lower(se.owner)=lower(r.owner) AND lower(se.object_name)=lower(r.object_name)
    JOIN sql_snap sq
      ON sq.dbname=se.dbname AND sq.instance=se.instance AND sq.begin_snap=se.begin_snap
    WHERE sq.sql_id <> (SELECT sql_id FROM focus_sql)
    GROUP BY sq.sql_id
  ) x
),

/* =========================
   WAIT focus
   ========================= */
focus_wait AS (
  SELECT fval AS event FROM params
  WHERE (SELECT ftype FROM params)='wait' AND fval<>''
),

wait_top_segments AS (
  SELECT s.owner, s.object_name, s.obj_type, AVG(s.severity_score) AS seg_score
  FROM awr_segment_summary_mv s
  JOIN params p ON p.dbname=s.dbname AND p.instance=s.instance
  WHERE s.begin_snap BETWEEN (SELECT s_snap FROM params) AND (SELECT e_snap FROM params)
  GROUP BY s.owner, s.object_name, s.obj_type
  ORDER BY AVG(s.severity_score) DESC
  LIMIT 10
),

wait_seg_sql_text AS (
  SELECT w.owner, w.object_name, w.obj_type,
         string_agg(DISTINCT m.sql_id, ', ' ORDER BY m.sql_id) AS sql_ids,
         MAX(w.seg_score) AS seg_score,
         1 AS pref
  FROM wait_top_segments w
  JOIN awr_sql_object_map_mv m
    ON ( (m.owner <> '' AND m.owner=lower(w.owner) AND m.object=lower(w.object_name))
      OR (m.owner = ''  AND m.object=lower(w.object_name)) )
  GROUP BY w.owner, w.object_name, w.obj_type
),

wait_seg_sql_co AS (
  SELECT w.owner, w.object_name, w.obj_type,
         string_agg(DISTINCT sq.sql_id, ', ' ORDER BY sq.sql_id) AS sql_ids,
         MAX(w.seg_score) AS seg_score,
         2 AS pref
  FROM wait_top_segments w
  JOIN seg_snap se
    ON lower(se.owner)=lower(w.owner) AND lower(se.object_name)=lower(w.object_name)
  JOIN sql_snap sq
    ON sq.dbname=se.dbname AND sq.instance=se.instance AND sq.begin_snap=se.begin_snap
  GROUP BY w.owner, w.object_name, w.obj_type
),

wait_seg_sql_union AS (
  SELECT * FROM wait_seg_sql_text
  UNION
  SELECT * FROM wait_seg_sql_co
),

block_wait_segments AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(
           string_agg('• '|| owner||'.'||object_name||' ('||obj_type||') [score='||ROUND(seg_score,2)::text||']',
                      E'\n' ORDER BY seg_score DESC),
           '—'
         ) AS txt
  FROM wait_top_segments
),

block_wait_sqls AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(
           string_agg('• '|| owner||'.'||object_name||' → '|| COALESCE(sql_ids,'—'),
                      E'\n' ORDER BY pref, seg_score DESC),
           '—'
         ) AS txt
  FROM wait_seg_sql_union
),

/* =========================
   SEGMENT focus
   ========================= */
focus_segment AS (
  SELECT lower(NULLIF('$focus_value','')) AS obj_txt
  WHERE (SELECT ftype FROM params)='segment' AND (SELECT fval FROM params)<>'' 
),

seg_obj AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT s.owner, s.object_name, s.obj_type
  FROM awr_segment_summary_mv s, params p
  WHERE p.dbname=s.dbname AND p.instance=s.instance
    AND s.begin_snap BETWEEN (SELECT s_snap FROM params) AND (SELECT e_snap FROM params)
    AND (
         lower(s.object_name)=(SELECT obj_txt FROM focus_segment)
         OR lower(s.owner||'.'||s.object_name)=(SELECT obj_txt FROM focus_segment)
        )
),

block_seg_waits AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(
           string_agg('• '|| event || ' ['|| ROUND(wait_pct,2)::text || '%]',
                      E'\n' ORDER BY wait_pct DESC),
           '—'
         ) AS txt
  FROM win_waits
  WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM seg_obj)
),

block_seg_sqls AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(
           string_agg('• '|| sql_id, E'\n' ORDER BY avg_sql_score DESC NULLS LAST),
           '—'
         ) AS txt
  FROM (
    -- TEXT MAP first
    SELECT DISTINCT m.sql_id,
           (SELECT AVG(severity_score)
              FROM awr_sql_summary_mv q
              JOIN params p ON p.dbname=q.dbname AND p.instance=q.instance
             WHERE lower(q.sql_id)=m.sql_id
               AND q.begin_snap BETWEEN (SELECT s_snap FROM params) AND (SELECT e_snap FROM params)
           ) AS avg_sql_score,
           1 AS pref
    FROM seg_obj o
    JOIN awr_sql_object_map_mv m
      ON ( (m.owner <> '' AND m.owner=lower(o.owner) AND m.object=lower(o.object_name))
        OR (m.owner = ''  AND m.object=lower(o.object_name)) )
    UNION ALL
    -- Fallback co-occurrence
    SELECT sq.sql_id,
           AVG(sq.sql_score_snap) AS avg_sql_score,
           2 AS pref
    FROM seg_obj o
    JOIN seg_snap se
      ON lower(se.owner)=lower(o.owner) AND lower(se.object_name)=lower(o.object_name)
    JOIN sql_snap sq
      ON sq.dbname=se.dbname AND sq.instance=se.instance AND sq.begin_snap=se.begin_snap
    GROUP BY sq.sql_id
  ) u
),

/* =========================
   Recommendation text (unchanged)
   ========================= */
pick_rule AS (
  SELECT r.rule_text
  FROM awr_recommendation_rules r
  JOIN params p ON r.category = p.ftype
  WHERE r.rule_key = (SELECT fval FROM params) OR r.rule_key='*'
  ORDER BY CASE WHEN r.rule_key=(SELECT fval FROM params) THEN 1 ELSE 2 END
  LIMIT 1
),

/* =========================
   Final rows
   ========================= */
rows AS (
  SELECT 1 AS ord, 'Focus' AS section,
         CASE WHEN (SELECT ftype FROM params) <> ''
              THEN (SELECT ftype FROM params)||': '||COALESCE((SELECT fval FROM params),'—')
              ELSE '—' END AS value
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 2, 'Signals',
         'Scope: '||COALESCE((SELECT scope_txt FROM params),'all')
         ||' | Range: '||(SELECT s_label FROM params)||' → '||(SELECT e_label FROM params)

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 3, 'Top Segments', (SELECT txt FROM block_wait_segments)
  WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM focus_wait)
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 4, 'Top SQLs referencing segments', (SELECT txt FROM block_wait_sqls)
  WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM focus_wait)

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 3, 'Segments referenced by SQL', (SELECT txt FROM block_sql_segments)
  WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM focus_sql)
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 4, 'Other SQLs using these objects', (SELECT txt FROM block_sql_other_sqls)
  WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM focus_sql)
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 5, 'Top Waits (window)', (SELECT txt FROM block_sql_waits)
  WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM focus_sql)

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 3, 'Top Waits (window)', (SELECT txt FROM block_seg_waits)
  WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM seg_obj)
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 4, 'Top SQLs for this segment', (SELECT txt FROM block_seg_sqls)
  WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM seg_obj)

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 9, 'Recommendation',
         COALESCE((SELECT rule_text FROM pick_rule), 'No recommendation found for this selection.')
)
SELECT section, value
FROM rows, params p
WHERE p.open_flag = 'true'
ORDER BY ord;

WITH sga_base AS (
SELECT sga_target_size_m, sga_size_factor, AVG(est_db_time_s) AS  avg_db_time,  AVG(est_physical_reads) AS avg_reads
FROM awr_advisory_sga 
WHERE '$dbname' != '' AND '$instance' != '' 
AND '$start_snap' != '' AND '$end_snap' != ''  
AND dbname = '$dbname'  AND instance = '$instance'
AND begin_snap BETWEEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int AND split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int
GROUP BY sga_target_size_m, sga_size_factor), 
current_sga AS (
SELECT AVG(sga_target_size_m) AS cur_sga_mb, AVG(avg_db_time) AS cur_db_time, AVG(avg_reads) AS cur_reads 
FROM sga_base 
WHERE sga_size_factor = 1), 
plateau_calc AS (
SELECT *, LAG(avg_db_time) OVER (ORDER BY sga_target_size_m) AS prev_time, 
LAG(avg_reads) OVER (ORDER BY sga_target_size_m) AS prev_reads 
FROM sga_base WHERE sga_size_factor > 1), 
optimal_sga AS ( 
SELECT sga_target_size_m, avg_db_time AS opt_db_time, avg_reads AS opt_reads
FROM plateau_calc 
WHERE   (prev_time - avg_db_time) / NULLIF(prev_time,0) < 0.01 OR (prev_reads - avg_reads) / NULLIF(prev_reads,0) < 0.01 
ORDER BY sga_target_size_m LIMIT 1), 
os_memory AS (
SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN statistic ILIKE '%FREE_MEMORY%' THEN value END)/1024/1024 AS free_ram_mb,
MAX(CASE WHEN statistic ILIKE '%PHYSICAL_MEMORY%' THEN value END)/1024/1024 AS total_ram_mb  
FROM awr_os_statistics  
WHERE '$dbname' != '' AND '$instance' != '' 
AND '$start_snap' != '' AND '$end_snap' != '' 
AND dbname = '$dbname'  AND instance = '$instance'
AND begin_snap BETWEEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int AND split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int) 
SELECT 
ROUND(c.cur_sga_mb) AS current_sga_mb, 
ROUND(o.sga_target_size_m) AS recommended_sga_mb, 
ROUND(((c.cur_db_time - o.opt_db_time) / c.cur_db_time) * 100, 2) AS db_time_improvement_pct, 
ROUND(c.cur_reads) AS current_physical_reads,
ROUND(o.opt_reads) AS estimated_physical_reads,
ROUND(c.cur_reads - o.opt_reads) AS reduced_physical_reads, 
ROUND(((c.cur_reads - o.opt_reads) / NULLIF(c.cur_reads,0)) * 100, 2) AS reduced_physical_reads_pct, 
CASE WHEN COUNT(*) OVER() >= 10 THEN 95 
WHEN COUNT(*) OVER() >= 5  THEN 85 
ELSE 70 END AS confidence_score, 
CASE WHEN ((c.cur_db_time - o.opt_db_time) / NULLIF(c.cur_db_time,0)) > 0.15 
AND ((c.cur_reads - o.opt_reads) / NULLIF(c.cur_reads,0)) > 0.20 THEN 'HIGHLY STABLE' 
WHEN ((c.cur_db_time - o.opt_db_time) / NULLIF(c.cur_db_time,0)) > 0.05 THEN 'MODERATELY STABLE' 
ELSE 'LOW STABILITY' END AS trend_stability, 
CASE WHEN ((c.cur_reads - o.opt_reads) / NULLIF(c.cur_reads,0)) > 0.30 THEN 'HIGH' 
WHEN ((c.cur_reads - o.opt_reads) / NULLIF(c.cur_reads,0)) > 0.10 THEN 'MEDIUM' 
ELSE 'LOW' END AS undersize_risk, 
ROUND(m.free_ram_mb)  AS free_ram_mb,
ROUND(m.total_ram_mb) AS total_ram_mb, 
CASE WHEN (m.free_ram_mb - o.sga_target_size_m) < 0 THEN 'INSUFFICIENT MEMORY – DO NOT APPLY' 
ELSE 'OK TO IMPLEMENT' 
END AS memory_validation_status 
FROM current_sga c 
JOIN optimal_sga o ON 1=1 
JOIN os_memory m ON 1=1;

WITH pga_base AS (
SELECT pga_target_est_mb, size_factor, AVG(estd_pga_cache_hit_pct) AS avg_cache_hit, 
AVG(estd_extra_written_to_disk) AS avg_disk_writes 
FROM awr_advisory_pga 
WHERE '$dbname' != '' AND '$instance' != '' AND '$start_snap' != '' AND '$end_snap' != ''  
AND dbname = '$dbname'  AND instance = '$instance' 
AND begin_snap BETWEEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int AND split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int 
GROUP BY pga_target_est_mb, size_factor), 
current_pga AS ( 
SELECT AVG(pga_target_est_mb) AS cur_pga_mb, AVG(avg_cache_hit) AS cur_cache_hit, AVG(avg_disk_writes)   AS cur_disk_writes 
FROM pga_base 
WHERE size_factor = 1), 
plateau_calc AS ( 
SELECT *, 
LAG(avg_cache_hit)  OVER (ORDER BY pga_target_est_mb) AS prev_hit, 
LAG(avg_disk_writes) OVER (ORDER BY pga_target_est_mb) AS prev_disk 
FROM pga_base WHERE size_factor > 1), 
optimal_pga AS ( 
SELECT pga_target_est_mb,avg_cache_hit AS opt_cache_hit, avg_disk_writes AS opt_disk_writes 
FROM plateau_calc 
WHERE (avg_cache_hit - prev_hit) / NULLIF(prev_hit,0) < 0.01 OR (prev_disk - avg_disk_writes) / NULLIF(prev_disk,0) < 0.01 
ORDER BY pga_target_est_mb LIMIT 1), 
os_memory AS ( 
SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN statistic ILIKE '%FREE_MEMORY%' THEN value END)/1024/1024 AS free_ram_mb, 
MAX(CASE WHEN statistic ILIKE '%PHYSICAL_MEMORY%' THEN value END)/1024/1024 AS total_ram_mb 
FROM awr_os_statistics 
WHERE '$dbname' != '' AND '$instance' != '' 
AND '$start_snap' != '' AND '$end_snap' != '' 
AND dbname = '$dbname'  AND instance = '$instance' 
AND begin_snap BETWEEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int AND split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int), 
pga_safety AS (
SELECT *, 
CASE WHEN free_ram_mb > 8192 THEN 1.2 
WHEN free_ram_mb > 4096 THEN 1.5 
ELSE 2.0 END AS risk_multiplier FROM os_memory) 
SELECT 
ROUND(c.cur_pga_mb) AS current_pga_mb, 
ROUND(o.pga_target_est_mb) AS recommended_pga_mb, 
ROUND((o.opt_cache_hit - c.cur_cache_hit), 2) AS cache_hit_gain_pct, 
ROUND(c.cur_disk_writes) AS current_disk_writes, 
ROUND(o.opt_disk_writes) AS estimated_disk_writes, 
ROUND(c.cur_disk_writes - o.opt_disk_writes) AS disk_write_reduction, 
ROUND(((c.cur_disk_writes - o.opt_disk_writes) / NULLIF(c.cur_disk_writes,0)) * 100,2) AS reduced_disk_write_pct, 
CASE WHEN COUNT(*) OVER() >= 10 THEN 95 
WHEN COUNT(*) OVER() >= 5  THEN 85 
ELSE 70 END AS confidence_score, 
CASE WHEN (o.opt_cache_hit - c.cur_cache_hit) > 5 AND ((c.cur_disk_writes - o.opt_disk_writes) / NULLIF(c.cur_disk_writes,0)) > 0.20 THEN 'HIGHLY STABLE' 
WHEN (o.opt_cache_hit - c.cur_cache_hit) > 1 THEN 'MODERATELY STABLE' 
ELSE 'LOW STABILITY' END AS trend_stability, 
CASE WHEN ((c.cur_disk_writes - o.opt_disk_writes) / NULLIF(c.cur_disk_writes,0)) > 0.30 
THEN 'HIGH' 
WHEN ((c.cur_disk_writes - o.opt_disk_writes) / NULLIF(c.cur_disk_writes,0)) > 0.10 THEN 'MEDIUM' 
ELSE 'LOW' END AS undersize_risk, 
ROUND(m.free_ram_mb) AS free_ram_mb,
ROUND(m.total_ram_mb) AS total_ram_mb,
ROUND(m.free_ram_mb - (o.pga_target_est_mb * s.risk_multiplier),2) AS safe_ram_headroom_mb, 
CASE WHEN (m.free_ram_mb - (o.pga_target_est_mb * s.risk_multiplier)) < 0 THEN 'INSUFFICIENT MEMORY – DO NOT APPLY' 
WHEN (m.free_ram_mb - (o.pga_target_est_mb * s.risk_multiplier)) < 2048 THEN 'HIGH MEMORY PRESSURE' 
WHEN (m.free_ram_mb - (o.pga_target_est_mb * s.risk_multiplier)) < 8192 THEN 'MODERATE MEMORY PRESSURE'
ELSE 'SAFE' END AS pga_memory_risk_status 
FROM current_pga c 
JOIN optimal_pga o ON 1=1 
JOIN os_memory m   ON 1=1 
JOIN pga_safety s  ON 1=1;
